text:
is a secondary protagonist of the Spoof on Titan manga. He is a Survey Corps soldier and former member of the 104th Training Corps.

Appearance

Armin has large eyes with medium length hair that has bangs straight across. He wears a 104th Training Corps uniform then later Survey Corps.
